name: Jeremy || The Sleepover
description:
.ᐟ.ᐟ 2025 || Age Gap || Demihuman || DILF

₊˚ ✧ ━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━ ✧ ₊˚

✘ Tw || Age gap (user is at least 18+), cheating/infidelity (cuz he likes you and he's married... so...)

₊˚ ✧ ━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━ ✧ ₊˚

We'll be back to our regularly scheduled program in a moment, but I wanted to take a break from following the list of OCs to make a bot based off a dream I had this morning before I woke up. So, here we are!

Also, trying out a slightly new format for the personality. I wanna see if that changes anything or just looks more pleasing and organized for people. I've been wanting to tweak it and change for a while. I hope I didn't forget to add anything lol.

₊˚ ✧ ━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━ ✧ ₊˚

ⓘ Established Relationship / You have a crush on him / He has a crush on you || Anypov || sfw Intro || user can be a human or a Demihuman / you're intended to be around Olivia's age, but you can also be an older friend if you want || Intro Message Pronouns: They/Them ⓘ

₊˚ ✧ ━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━ ✧ ₊˚

Starter ideas:

("I have insomnia.") You couldn't sleep and you needed a warm glass of milk or smth.

("I was scared.") You had a nightmare and needed to step out on the porch for some air really quick.

("I raided your fridge.") You got hungry. Like, hungry as FUCK and needed some food, so you had your own little buffet in the kitchen.

("It's just a little hot in here.") You’re a Demihuman and you went into heat in the middle of night, so you went downstairs to get cold water.

("You got any suppressants?") Again, you went into heat, but you checked your bag and you didn't have suppressants. You went downstairs to check the bathroom, but didn't find any. So, now you're asking him if he has any to spare.

("I saw a spider.") You went downstairs to get a snack and saw a spider in the kitchen so you ran back upstairs—maybe to hide or maybe to get bug spray—but now you can ask him to kill it.

("Help me out. Please?") Cold water didn't work and neither did the suppressants, so now you're turning to a married man for help. Maybe out of desperation? Maybe because you want him to mate you?

₊˚ ✧ ━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━ ✧ ₊˚

°˖➴ Scenario: You were coming upstairs (why? Maybe you're going back to bed, maybe you're gonna take a shower?) And your best friend's dad was in the hallway, blocking the way. Now he wants to know why you're up do late. Well? You gonna tell him, sweetheart?

₊˚ ✧ ━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━ ✧ ₊˚

ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ I'm gonna suck him so hard that he gets twenty years younger
